title: Algorithmic Trading Strategy
scenario: Generate a Python function that takes as input a list of stock prices and returns a list of buy and sell signals based on a moving average crossover strategy. The function should calculate the short-term and long-term moving averages and generate signals based on their crossover. The prompt should be under 300 characters.
constraints: Calculate the short-term and long-term moving averages
Generate buy and sell signals based on the moving average crossover

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically correct.
Check if the moving average crossover strategy produces the expected results.
Check if the code is readable and follows standard Python coding practices.
